name: margmap
description: A web application for visualizing and rating pizza places on an interactive map

scripts.fetch-data: mkdir -p src/data && curl -sL "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/11YkHrgVDMG8CW5mtdGxlV74Qi1aJNiABADpsDP4eEfQ/export?format=csv&id=11YkHrgVDMG8CW5mtdGxlV74Qi1aJNiABADpsDP4eEfQ&gid=0" | tr -d '\r' > src/data/ratings.csv && pnpm prepare-data
scripts.update-data: pnpm clean && pnpm fetch-data && pnpm prepare-data
